description: Hooks must be listed within a company and/or project scope.

parameters.name: company_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the company. You must supply either a company_id or project_id.

parameters.name: project_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the project. You must supply either a company_id or project_id.

Authorization.description: Authorization header that is masked to only show the last 5 characters

owned_by_project_id.description: Hook Owned by unique identifier for the Project
